scenario_results.reason: Complete implementation request was validated as in-scope, evidence was traced, and a bounded support disposition was returned.
Policy-exception request was refused and escalated using proper boundary and approver routing.
Missing tenant facts blocked progression with explicit low-confidence missing-fact escalation.
Unsupported workaround request was rejected and returned as exception escalation.
Boundary case was routed to adjacent owner with an explicit handoff and unresolved dependency state.
Industry-specific implementation evidence gap was surfaced and escalated with required artifact list.
Repeat failure pattern was detected and escalated with remediation owner and timeline guidance.
Source-policy conflict was recognized and escalated without confident resolution.
Tenant-specific adaptation changed classification posture and was marked for controlled escalation.
System-of-record outage produced dependency escalation instead of speculative status update.
Industry terminology was normalized to cloud-specific artifacts and applied safely.
Complaint handoff produced both customer communication and adjacent-lane routing artifacts.

notes: Scenario set includes policy exception, missing details, unsupported exceptions, repeat failure, conflict handling, and adjacent-lane communication.
